use regex::Regex;

// BAD: regex compiled inside loop
fn validate_entries(entries: &[Entry]) -> Vec<&Entry> {
    let pattern = r"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$";
    entries.iter()
        .filter(|entry| {
            let re = Regex::new(pattern).unwrap();
            re.is_match(&entry.date)
        })
        .collect()
}

fn extract_fields(text: &str, patterns: &[&str]) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for pattern in patterns {
        let re = Regex::new(pattern).unwrap();
        if let Some(caps) = re.captures(text) {
            results.push(caps[1].to_string());
        }
    }
    results
}
